claim_bullets.bullet_text: The Sword World RPG Replay Collections help understand gameplay through actual play reproductions, though they are based on the old rule version and may have contradictions (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.8-13).

source_record_text: This section introduces supplementary materials for the Sword World RPG, such as Replay Collections, Scenario Collections, World Guide, and other related works.
